Made using traditional towel embroidery, a hand-stitched technique with specialized needlework creating looped stitches for a towel-like texture and effect. Sizes: S-XL.

Hermès Paris Saddle Stud Appliqué Crewneck Sweatshirt, custom-dyed dense air-layer cotton. Delicate, soft, and comfortable against the skin. Dominated by deep smoky gray, exuding effortless luxury. Some marks need no announcement—simplified yet rich in detail. Crafted with traditional terry embroidery, using specialized machine stitching to create looped textures resembling terry cloth. Fabric is washed for enhanced feel, durability, shrink resistance, and colorfastness. Loose fit. Sizes: S-XL.

The chest features a horse head embroidery theme, seemingly simple but crafted with multi-colored towel embroidery, adding intricate and refined touches. The half-zip placket includes detailed logo lettering. The fitted cut offers a youthful, fashionable, and sophisticated look.

The slightly relaxed fit uses Austrian modal fiber, known as breathable air-layer fabric. Its three-layer structure (inner, middle, outer) creates an air cushion within the fabric, providing excellent loft, elasticity, warmth retention, wrinkle resistance, softness, skin-friendliness, smoothness, breathability, and overall durability. The garment maintains a sharp, structured silhouette when worn.

Available sizes: M to 3XL.
